TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Serbia, title = Serbia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Serbia} }

S.FORM: Serbia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 44 00 N, 21 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 77,474 sq km (maki' tay 117 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 77,474 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 6,647,003. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 57.90%, lhlahuy hya' ga 31.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 10.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Belgrade. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 15 na tay sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tomislav Nikolińá, aring ryax 31 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Serbia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 44 00 N, 21 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 77,474 sq km (maki' tay 117 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 77,474 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 6,647,003. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 57.90%, lhlahuy hya' ga 31.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 10.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Belgrade. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 15 na tay sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tomislav Nikolińá, aring ryax 31 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēerő≤ia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj *** …£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤el…£ra*e. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tomis~…ēla* nikoli*, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
